commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs human/contributor current-head proof and maintainer product-contract acceptance; the code cleanup is concrete but should not be routed as automated repair while proof is stale.; Needs attention: The diff is mostly careful about secrets, but one pre-submit failure path can leave generated SSH key material in local adapter state after acquire fails.; Review finding: [P2] Roll back validation failur... (sha=05b61bfb77c45a6cb66425dbac925c000f959a40)
commands.review_summary:
Adds Slurm academic sandbox guidance, a `provider: external` reference adapter, a sample unprivileged sshd runner, fake-Slurm pytest coverage, and Python cache ignores.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: `acquire` creates the job directory/key before runner and `sbatch_command` validation are inside a rollback path. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and the relevant tests would create artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs human/contributor current-head proof and maintainer product-contract acceptance; the code cleanup is concrete but should not be routed as automated repair while proof is stale.

target.title: docs: add Slurm academic sandbox plan and adapter
target.body:
Closes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/325

## Summary

Adds a campus Slurm external-provider reference path without putting cluster-specific scheduler, account, filesystem, gateway, or security policy in Crabbox core.

- Documents the recommended Slurm shape as `provider: external`.
- Adds `examples/slurm-external-provider/slurm-cbx.py`, a conservative adapter for `doctor`, `acquire`, `resolve`, `list`, `release`, `touch`, and `cleanup`.
- Adds `runner-unprivileged-sshd.sh` as a sample allocation-side SSH endpoint publisher.
- Adds fake-Slurm pytest coverage for acquire/resolve/release, idempotency, timeout rollback, unknown scheduler state, failed cancellation, list filtering, and cleanup.

## Verification

Local validation on current head `a0c254d68c8306d4bbad7aa6bc5abf1803c5d464`:

```text
python3 -m py_compile examples/slurm-external-provider/slurm-cbx.py examples/slurm-external-provider/test_slurm_cbx.py
PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python3 -m pytest examples/slurm-external-provider -q
node scripts/check-command-docs.mjs
node scripts/check-docs-links.mjs
bash -n examples/slurm-external-provider/runner-unprivileged-sshd.sh
git diff --check
```

Public CI is green on current head: https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/actions/runs/28093201129

## Representative Protocol Proof

Representative external-provider proof was run against the actual adapter with fake `sbatch`/`squeue`/`sacct`/`scancel` binaries on PATH, no real campus credentials required:

```text
PATH=<fake-slurm-bin>:$PATH \
  examples/slurm-external-provider/slurm-cbx.py \
  --state-dir <tmp>/state \
  --runner-script <tmp>/runner.sh \
  --poll-interval 0
```

Proof summary:

```text
doctor -> protocolVersion=1, Slurm external provider ready
acquire -> lease cbx_slurmproof01, cloudId slurm/job/123456;cluster, status ready, SSH host node123.cluster.example.edu:39022
list -> one ready lease with slurmState RUNNING
release -> released Slurm lease, fake scheduler called scancel 123456
list after release -> []
```

Full redacted output is posted here: https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/345#issuecomment-4789501248

## Merge Caveat

This is representative proof, not live campus Slurm proof. Do not merge unless maintainers accept representative proof as sufficient for this P3 external-adapter docs/example contract; live campus proof remains stronger.
target.author: zozo123

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: vincentkoc
